message:
Add E2E and evidence conformance test suites across all subsystems

Comprehensive conformance expansion with E2E scenario tests and
evidence collection for every major SciPy subsystem:

E2E tests (new):
- e2e_casp.rs: CASP (constrained algebraic solving) E2E scenarios
- e2e_ivp.rs: initial value problem solver E2E scenarios
- e2e_sparse.rs: sparse matrix operations E2E scenarios
- e2e_special.rs: special functions E2E scenarios

Evidence collection (new):
- evidence_p2c001.rs: P2C-001 (FFT) evidence gathering
- evidence_p2c003.rs: P2C-003 (sparse) evidence gathering
- evidence_p2c004.rs: P2C-004 (optimization) evidence gathering
- evidence_p2c005.rs: P2C-005 (FFT routing) evidence gathering
- evidence_p2c006.rs: P2C-006 (special functions) evidence gathering
- golden_journeys.rs: cross-subsystem golden journey validation

Updated:
- e2e_fft.rs: minor fix in existing FFT E2E test
- Cargo.toml updates: dev-dependencies for FFT, opt, sparse, special

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
